title: jurinea dolomitica
intro: Jurinea dolomitica, also known as Dolomit Jurinea or Mountain Fleabane, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exerting antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, Jurinea dolomitica is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
